creator: freebsd@crystalflame.net
text:
The port was looking for 1.19, which disappeared recently and was
	replaced with 1.20.  Enclosed is the update to the port to make
	it look for 1.20 in the proper location.

Fix: Install the enclosed update; the package will then install.

	MASTER_SITES changed because the symbolic link in
	wmbattery/ hasn't been created at the site at this time.
How-To-Repeat: 	Attempt to install the port in cvsup as of the time of this message.
